title: USSR Hoe
description: Replaces the netherite hoe with a hammer and sickle
body:
This unique texture pack for Minecraft will add an atmosphere of Soviet symbols to your world. Instead of a standard netherite hoe, you will get a tool designed in the form of the legendary sickle and hammer, a symbol of the working people and the unity of workers. The design is inspired by the flag of the USSR: the handle made of dark metal resembles durable netherite, symbolizing strength and hard work.

With this pack, your game will acquire a new aesthetic inspired by the Soviet era. Pave the way to new achievements with a symbol that changed history!
